economic_ownership_map.label: Core products and services owner-cash engine
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Core products and services owner-cash engine

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

low.label: FY2025 net cash from operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment
FY2025 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)
Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
low.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; buybacks reduce share count but do not change per-share cash generation anchor.

low.label: Duration-adjusted owner free-cash-flow capitalization multiple
low.rationale: Bear stresses iPhone cycle and China share loss; base mid-cycle seven-year path; bull modest Services mix uplift without peak-cycle heroics.

low.label: Core products and services engine per share

base.label: FY2025 net cash from operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment

base.label: Duration-adjusted owner free-cash-flow capitalization multiple
base.rationale: Bear stresses iPhone cycle and China share loss; base mid-cycle seven-year path; bull modest Services mix uplift without peak-cycle heroics.

base.label: Core products and services engine per share

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from AAPL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251031_rpt20250927_acc0000320193_25_000079.htm: FY2025 revenue $307003.0M, OCF $111482.0M, FCF $98767.0M, Services $109158.0M, cash and securities $132420.0M, total debt $90678.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Services installed-base and platform monetization option
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Services installed-base and platform monetization option

low.label: Risk-adjusted incremental installed-base and Services monetization
low.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on high-margin Services, App Store, and Apple Intelligence monetization beyond normalized hardware free cash flow; base is judgment band.

base.label: Risk-adjusted incremental installed-base and Services monetization
base.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on high-margin Services, App Store, and Apple Intelligence monetization beyond normalized hardware free cash flow; base is judgment band.

high.label: Risk-adjusted incremental installed-base and Services monetization
high.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on high-margin Services, App Store, and Apple Intelligence monetization beyond normalized hardware free cash flow; base is judgment band.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from AAPL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251031_rpt20250927_acc0000320193_25_000079.htm: FY2025 revenue $307003.0M, OCF $111482.0M, FCF $98767.0M, Services $109158.0M, cash and securities $132420.0M, total debt $90678.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Installed-base monetization through App Store, iCloud, and Apple Intelligence over 3 to 7 years.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from FY2025 Services net sales $109.2B trajectory; Apple does not disclose standalone Apple Intelligence revenue.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Services scale uses existing platform; incremental R&D embedded in consolidated spend.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Net cash, securities, and debt claims on common equity
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Net cash, securities, and debt claims on common equity

low.label: Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities
Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating liquidity reserve
low.rationale: Filing-locked cash and marketable securities less total debt; low stresses refinancing and trapped liquidity; high credits excess securities net of debt.

base.label: Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities
Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating liquidity reserve
base.rationale: Filing-locked cash and marketable securities less total debt; low stresses refinancing and trapped liquidity; high credits excess securities net of debt.

high.label: Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities
Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating liquidity reserve
high.rationale: Filing-locked cash and marketable securities less total debt; low stresses refinancing and trapped liquidity; high credits excess securities net of debt.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Services installed-base and platform monetization option
Core products and services owner-cash engine
China, antitrust, and hardware cycle stress reserve
Net cash, securities, and debt claims on common equity

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
